commands.name: watch

options.name: --simple
options.description:
Use simple output mode without full-screen
TUI

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Show verbose output including all file
changes

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the solution file (.sln or .slnx)

commands.description:
Watch for file changes and automatically regenerate 
code

commands.name: update

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Show what would be changed without making actual
changes

options.name: --skip-generate
options.description:
Skip running 'dotnet faes generate' after
update

options.name: --skip-git-check
options.description:
Skip the git clean working directory check (not
recommended)

options.name: --version
options.description: Target version to update to (default: latest)

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the solution file (.sln or .slnx)

commands.description:
Update ErikLieben.FA.ES packages and migrate code for breaking 
changes
